englishDefinitions: (informal) To start early, especially before something begins or before others begin; to get a head start.
persianTranslation: (غیررسمی) برای شروع زودهنگام، به ویژه قبل از شروع چیزی یا قبل از شروع دیگران. برای شروع
examples: If you'd like to get a jump on the holiday season, many craft stores already have holiday patterns out.
